critical_issues.title: Missing RBAC role assignments for managed identity to host storage account
critical_issues.resolution: Added storage-account scoped role assignments for Storage Blob Data Contributor and Storage Queue Data Contributor using the function app system-assigned principal ID.

suggestions.title: Avoid exposing Application Insights connection string as deployment output
suggestions.resolution: Removed applicationInsightsConnectionString from top-level deployment outputs.

suggestions.title: Add explicit validation for operational readiness acceptance criterion
suggestions.resolution: No deployment/runtime automation scripts exist in this repository; operational readiness requires post-deploy validation in Azure portal/CLI during environment deployment.
